title: allosorus glaucus
intro: Allosorus glaucus, also known as the glaucous spike moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The glaucous spike moss has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Allosorus glaucus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including bronchitis, coughs, and skin conditions.
